title: The Missed Opportunity
content: Years ago, Daniel almost asked Olivia out after one of their university classes, but fear convinced him to stay silent. They lost contact after graduation and built separate lives. One afternoon, they unexpectedly met during a business conference. Daniel smiled and admitted that he had always regretted missing his chance. Olivia laughed and confessed that she had hoped he would ask her back then. They decided not to waste another opportunity. Some chances return only once, and they were determined to make the most of it.
